name.title: Name
name.description: Display name for the accessory in HomeKit

host.title: Unit IP Address
host.description: IP address of your Envirovent Atmos PIV unit. Find it via your router or the myenvirovent app.

port.title: Port
port.description: TCP port (default: 1337). Only change if you know your unit uses a different port.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to poll the unit for status updates. Minimum 5 seconds.

showBoostSwitch.title: Show Boost Switch
showBoostSwitch.description: Expose a separate switch for boost mode. Can be used in HomeKit scenes and automations.

showHeaterSwitch.title: Show Heater Switch
showHeaterSwitch.description: Expose a switch to enable/disable the auto heater

showSummerShutdownSwitch.title: Show Summer Shutdown Switch
showSummerShutdownSwitch.description: Expose a switch to enable/disable summer shutdown mode
